name: Wild Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 to 4 cups Leek and mixed wild mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add flour and stir until smooth; cook for 1 minute.
3. Stir in salt and pepper, then add wine and onion; simmer until wine is reduced by half.
4. Add leeks and mixed wild mushrooms to the pot; cook until vegetables are softened.
5. Adjust seasoning as needed and serve hot.
